member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Horizontal alignment types.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.HorizontalAlignment.Left
member.summary: Left aligned.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.HorizontalAlignment.Right
member.summary: Right aligned.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.HorizontalAlignment.Center
member.summary: Centered.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.HorizontalAlignment.Justify
member.summary: Justified alignment.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle
member.summary: The style of line to generate when a leader is drawn defined by an enumeration value. Line leaders will always be drawn with their own geometry.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.Base
member.summary: The line callout leader is a single line originating from the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.MidPoint
member.summary: The line callout leader is a single line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or from the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.ThreePoint
member.summary: The line callout leader is a 3-point line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.FourPoint
member.summary: The line callout leader is a 4-point line originating from the midpoint of the left or right side of the text box with the gap applied or the midpoint of the accent bar if the callout has one.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.Underline
member.summary: The line callout draws a line that connects to the closest of the four corners of the text with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at either the top or bottom of the accent bar. Additionally, either and underline or an "overline" is drawn along the closest side (bottom or top) of the text.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.CircularCW
member.summary: The line callout leader is curved (clockwise) from the anchor point to the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LeaderLineStyle.CircularCCW
member.summary: The line callout leader is curved (counter-clockwise) from the anchor point to the closest corner of the text box with the gap applied. If the callout has an accent bar it is connected to the closest point at the either top or bottom of the accent bar.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineCallout
member.summary: Represents a line callout.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineCallout.LeaderLineSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the line symbol to draw leaders with.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineCallout.Gap
member.summary: Gets or sets the gap (in points) between the text symbol and the beginning of the leader line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineCallout.LineStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the style of line to generate when a Point leader is drawn defined by an enumeration value. Line leaders will always be drawn with their own geometry.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineCapStyle
member.summary: The style of stroke ending caps.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineCapStyle.Butt
member.summary: Stroke ends in butt caps.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineCapStyle.Round
member.summary: Stroke ends in round caps.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineCapStyle.Square
member.summary: Stroke ends in square caps.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding
member.summary: Determines how the strokes with dash patterns and other patterns (tiled pictures, placement effects) are handled at the end points of the line geometry's segments.
member.remarks: If more than one pattern exists (for example, a dashed simple stroke, a hash stroke, and a marker stroke) then the longest pattern's length is affected directly by this option and the rest of the stroke patterns are resized proportionately to match.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.NoConstraint
member.summary: No Constraint - no constraint is applied to how the dash is placed.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.HalfPattern
member.summary: Half Pattern - a half dash will be placed on either side of control points.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.HalfGap
member.summary: Half Gap - a space equal to the half the gap value will be placed on either side of control points.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.FullPattern
member.summary: Full Pattern - a full dash will be placed on either side of control points.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.FullGap
member.summary: Full Gap - a space equal to the gap value will be placed on either side of control points.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDashEnding.Custom
member.summary: Custom - the pattern is fit to the length of the feature by adjusting the gaps slightly.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle
member.summary: Defines simple decorations for lines.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.None
member.summary: No decoration.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.Custom
member.summary: The decoration is defined in the Layers property as a set of SymbolReferences.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.Circle
member.summary: A circle is added at the end of the line.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.OpenArrow
member.summary: An open arrow is added to the end of the line.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.ClosedArrow
member.summary: A closed arrow is added to the end of the line.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineDecorationStyle.Diamond
member.summary: A diamond is added at the end of the line.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineGapType
member.summary: Specifies the type of line gap (line spacing) that is applied.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineGapType.ExtraLeading
member.summary: Extra Leading - Adds the specified value to the line spacing that accommodates the largest font in the line

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineGapType.Multiple
member.summary: Multiple - Sets the line spacing based on a multiple of the line.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineGapType.Exact
member.summary: Exact - Sets a fixed line spacing

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineJoinStyle
member.summary: Specifies how the symbol is drawn at the stroke segment connections.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineJoinStyle.Bevel
member.summary: The stroke join is beveled.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineJoinStyle.Round
member.summary: The line join is round.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.LineJoinStyle.Miter
member.summary: The line join is mitered.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineSymbol
member.summary: Represents a line symbol which is used to draw polyline features or graphics.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineSymbol.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMLineSymbol with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMLineSymbol state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMLineSymbol.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMLineSymbol and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker
member.summary: Represents a marker which is a self-contained shape or image that can draw for a point graphic or placed in a repeating arrangement along a stroke or within a fill. It can be a glyph from a font, a picture, a collection of vector geometries, or a 3D model.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.AnchorPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the specified location where all transformation property operations originate.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.AnchorPointUnits
member.summary: Gets or sets a value which specifies if the anchor point location is considered a percentage of the size or as an absolute distance.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.AngleX
member.summary: Gets or sets the angle the marker is rotated around the X axis.
member.remarks: This type of rotation is also referred to as tilt and is only applied in 3D. The order of how this is applied with respect to other rotations depends on the RotationOrder3D. The name in the user interface is Tilt.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.AngleY
member.summary: Gets or sets the angle the marker is rotated around the Y axis.
member.remarks: This type of rotation is also referred to as roll and is only applied in 3D. The order of how this is applied with respect to other rotations depends on the RotationOrder3D. The name in the user interface is Roll.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.DominantSizeAxis3D
member.summary: Gets or sets which axis is considered as the Size in 3D. Only applicable when the marker layer is a 3DShapeMarker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.OffsetX
member.summary: Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the X axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.OffsetY
member.summary: Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the Y axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.OffsetZ
member.summary: Gets or sets the value the marker is moved along the Z axis from the anchor point. This is applied after all rotation, as opposed to anchor point which is applied before the rotation.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.RotateClockwise
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the rotation is applied clockwise or counterclockwise to the marker layer.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.Rotation
member.summary: Gets or sets the angle that the marker is rotated around the anchor point, in degrees.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.Size
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the marker. Modifying Size changes the marker's height to the specified size and the width is updated proportionally.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.BillboardMode3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the billboard mode of the marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarker.MarkerPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets marker placements which determine how markers are placed along a line or within a polygon.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerFillPlacement
member.summary: Represents a marker fill placement.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic
member.summary: Represents a marker graphic which is used to define vector graphics in a vector marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic.Geometry
member.summary: Gets or sets the geometry of the marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic.Symbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the symbol used to draw the marker graphic, can be a point, line, polygon, or text symbol.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic.TextString
member.summary: Gets or sets the text that is defined within the marker if drawn with a text symbol.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic.PrimitiveName
member.summary: Gets or sets the primitive name.

member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMMarkerGraphic with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMMarkerGraphic state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerGraphic.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMMarkerGraphic and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacement
member.summary: Represents a marker placement.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacement.PrimitiveName
member.summary: Gets or sets the primitive name.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacement.PlacePerPart
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to consider individual geometry parts or the whole geometry.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine
member.summary: Represents marker placement along the line which defines how a marker is placed along a line or polygon outline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine.CustomEndingOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets where the pattern should end relative to the ending point of the geometry. The entire pattern is shifted along the line for the specified distance. Negative numbers shift to the left and positive numbers shift to the right. This is only applied if the Endings property is set to Custom.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine.Endings
member.summary: Gets or sets how markers are placed at the end points of a line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine.OffsetAlongLine
member.summary: Gets or sets where the pattern should begin relative to the starting point of the geometry. The entire pattern is shifted along the line for the specified distance. Negative numbers shift to the left and positive numbers shift to the right. This is only applied if the Endings property is set to No Constraint or Custom.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLine.PlacementTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the numeric pattern that defines the sequence of placed markers and the length of space between them.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize
member.summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places randomly sized markers evenly along a line or polygon outline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize.Randomization
member.summary: Gets or sets the amount of randomness to be used for the size and rotation of the markers on the line. The size and rotation of the marker will vary for individual markers.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize.Seed
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting value for generating a random number. This random number is used by the Randomization property to determine the marker shape.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineRandomSize and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize
member.summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places markers that are the same size evenly along a line or polygon outline.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineSameSize and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize
member.summary: Represents marker placement along the line which places markers in either increasing, decreasing or alternating gradations along a line or polygon outline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.PlacementTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the numeric pattern that defines the sequence of placed markers and the length of space between them.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.Endings
member.summary: Gets or sets how markers are placed at the end points of a line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.ControlPointPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets how markers are placed at control points.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.MaxRandomOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum random offset.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.MaxZoom
member.summary: Gets or sets the largest size of the marker to be placed on the line. The value is expressed as a ratio.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.MinZoom
member.summary: Gets or sets the smallest size of the marker to be placed on the line. The value is expressed as a ratio.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.NumberOfSizes
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of different sizes of markers to be placed on the line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.Seed
member.summary: Gets or sets the starting value for generating a random number. This random number is used by the Randomization property to determine which size a marker will receive. This is only used if the VariationMethod is set to Random.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.VariationMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the order in which the change of size in the markers should occur.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMMarkerPlacementAlongLineVariableSize and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAroundPolygon
member.summary: Represents marker placement around polygon which places a marker on a specific position on the polygon outline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAroundPolygon.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position of the marker around the polygon.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAroundPolygon.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the offset from the polygon edge. Negative numbers offset toward the inside of the polygon.

member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMMarkerPlacementAroundPolygon with a specified state from a JSON encoding.

member.summary: Gets or sets which ends of the line a marker will be placed.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAtExtremities.OffsetAlongLine
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance from the ends of a line that the marker will be placed.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMarkerPlacementAtMeasuredUnits

member.summary: Symbol animates along the line by distance. The DistanceAlong property defines the distance as a percentage along the line to which the symbol will animate.

member.summary: Symbol animates along the line by speed. The Speed property defines the speed at which the symbol will animate along the line.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMultiLayerSymbol
member.summary: Represents a multilayer symbol, a generic type for point, line, and polygon symbols, specifying that they can contain more than one symbol layers.

member.summary: Gets or sets the animations that are applied to the symbol.

member.summary: Gets or sets the geometric effects that are applied to the symbol.

member.summary: Gets or sets the symbol layers. Symbol layers are the components that make up a symbol. A symbol layer is represented by a stroke, fill, marker, or procedural symbol layer.

member.summary: Gets or sets the representative image of the symbol as a base64 encoded string.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMMultiLayerSymbol.UseRealWorldSymbolSizes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the symbol size properties are rendered using real world units or page units. When set to true the symbol will draw using real world units (e.g. meters).

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill
member.summary: Represents a picture fill which fills polygonal geometry with a picture. Supported file types are .bmp, .jpg, .png, and .gif.

member.summary: Gets or sets the URL of the image. Typically a base64 encoded image.

member.summary: Gets or sets the distance that the image is offset in the horizontal direction.

member.summary: Gets or sets the distance that the image is offset in the vertical direction.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.Rotation
member.summary: Gets or sets angle of the image within the fill.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.ScaleX
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the symbol without changing the height (or depth in 3D), as a ratio.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the height of the image.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.TextureFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets how the image is resampled.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.ColorSubstitutions
member.summary: Gets or sets the color substitutions which allows colors in the image to be substituted with a different color.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureFill.TintColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color that is applied as a tint to the image. The color is applied to the whole image. When the tint is set to white the image appears with its native colors.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker
member.summary: Represents a picture marker created from a raster (bitmapped) image file. The image can have color substitutions to replace one or more colors in the image or it can have a tint applied to the whole image depending on the picture type. Supported formats are .bmp, .jpg, .png, and .gif.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker.ColorSubstitutions

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker.ScaleX
member.summary: Gets or sets the scale X which changes the width of the symbol without changing the height (or depth in 3D), as a ratio.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker.TextureFilter
member.summary: Gets or sets how the image is resampled.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker.TintColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color that is applied as a tint to the image. The color is applied to the whole image. When the tint is set to white the image appears with its native colors.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPictureMarker.URL
member.summary: Gets or sets the image that is used in the symbol layer. Typically a base64 encoded image.

member.summary: The marker is placed above the polygon.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementClip
member.summary: Options for how the markers should be clipped at the polygon boundary.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementClip.ClipAtBoundary
member.summary: Markers are clipped at the boundary of the polygon.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementClip.RemoveIfCenterOutsideBoundary
member.summary: Markers are not drawn if their center falls outside of the polygon.

member.summary: Markers are not drawn if they touch the boundary of the polygon.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementClip.DoNotClip
member.summary: Markers are not clipped and may extend past the boundary of the polygon.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings
member.summary: Options for how markers are placed at extremities and control points.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings.NoConstraint
member.summary: No constraint on how the markers are placed.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings.WithMarkers
member.summary: A marker is placed at the control point.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings.WithFullGap
member.summary: A space equal to the placement template will be placed at the control point.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings.WithHalfGap
member.summary: A space equal to half the placement template will be placed at the control point.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementEndings.Custom
member.summary: Will fit the pattern to the length of the features by adjusting the gaps slightly.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementGridType

member.summary: Markers are placed on a uniform grid.

member.summary: Markers are placed randomly in the polygon.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.PlacementGridType.RandomFixedQuantity
member.summary: Markers are placed randomly with a fixed quantity (dot density).

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMPointSymbolCallout
member.summary: Represents a point symbol callout which draws a point symbol as the background and a line symbol for leaders. Often used for highway shields.

member.summary: Gets or sets the symbol that will be drawn as the background behind the text. The most common use case for this type of symbol is a highway shield. When drawing a highway shield this property will be the shield itself without numbers.

member.summary: An enumeration that defines how the background point symbol is scaled to fit the dimensions of the text.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMShapeVertex
member.summary: Represents a shape vertex.
member.remarks: Each Vertex in a 3DShapeGraphic is represented by three points, contained in a ShapeVertex. The first point is the actual position of the Vertex. The second represents the normalized vector that describes the orientation of the point. The last point is optional - it defines the coordinates of the texture that correspond with this point in the shape. In this case only x and y are used as the traditional texture coordinates S and T.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMShapeVertex.Position
member.summary: Gets or sets the position.

member.summary: Gets or sets the normal vector.

member.summary: Gets or sets the texture coordinate.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor
member.summary: Defines the vertical anchor used to render the simple 3D line style in relation to the ground in 3D. This property is ignored for the Strip style which is drawn flat upon the surface, and for the Wall style which always uses a Bottom anchor.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor.Center
member.summary: The center of the 3D line style is vertically aligned with the ground. The 3D line style is rendered both above and under the ground as a result.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor.Bottom
member.summary: The 3D line style is rendered above the ground as the vertical anchor is set to the bottom of the style.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineAnchor.Top
member.summary: The 3D line style is rendered under the ground as the vertical anchor is set to the top of the style.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle
member.summary: Simple 3D line styles which define how strokes will be rendered in 3D.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.Tube
member.summary: Stroke draws as a circular tube where the width determines the diameter of the tube.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.Strip
member.summary: Stroke draws flat upon the surface at the specified width.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.Wall
member.summary: Stroke is vertically oriented where width determines the height of the wall.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.Square
member.summary: Stroke draws as a square tube where the width determines the height and width of the tube.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.Simple3DLineStyle.Rectangle
member.summary: Stroke draws as a rectangular tube where the width property determines the width and height3D determines the height of the tube.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSimpleLineCallout.AutoSnap
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not to auto-snap the line leaders to the text.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SimplePlacementEndings
member.summary: Options for how markers are placed at extremities and control points for the Variable Size marker placement.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SimplePlacementEndings.WithHalfGap
member.summary: A space equal to half the placement template will be placed at the control point.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SimplePlacementEndings.WithMarkers
member.summary: A marker is placed at the control point.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod
member.summary: Size variation methods which define the order in which the change of size in the markers should occur.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod.Random
member.summary: Change in size is applied randomly.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod.Increasing
member.summary: Markers are drawn with a pattern where the markers increase in size.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod.Decreasing
member.summary: Markers are drawn in a pattern where the markers decrease in size.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SizeVariationMethod.IncreasingThenDecreasing
member.summary: Markers are drawn in a pattern where the size increase and then decrease.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke
member.summary: Represents a stroke which defines how line geometry or the outline of polygon geometry is drawn.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.CapStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets how the stroke should draw at the ends of the geometries.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.JoinStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets how the symbol is drawn at the stroke segment connections.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.LineStyle3D
member.summary: Gets or sets how strokes will be rendered in 3D.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.MiterLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum 'sharpness' that is allowed for Miter joins. If the spike created by the miter join exceeds the miter limit times the width of the stroke, the sharp angle will be clipped and rendered with a bevel join. This property is only applied to the symbol layer when the JoinType is set to Miter.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.Width
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the stroke.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.CloseCaps3D
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to close caps when drawing them in 3D. When set to false, the caps are hollow.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.Height3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the height. Used when the 3D line style is Rectangle.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMStroke.Anchor3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical anchor of the 3D line style applied to the stroke. This property is ignored for the Strip and Wall styles.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbol
member.summary: Represents a symbol. A symbol is used to describe how a geometric shape, such as that from a graphic or feature, is displayed.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimation
member.summary: Represents an animation of a symbol, this is the base class for all animations.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimation.AnimatedSymbolProperties
member.summary: Gets or sets the animated symbol properties.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimation.PrimitiveName
member.summary: Gets or sets the primitive name.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationColor
member.summary: Represents the color animation.
member.remarks: Dynamically animates the symbol to the given color.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationColor.ToColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color to which the symbol will animate.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationColor.ColorMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating how the color animation is applied.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationColor.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMSymbolAnimationColor with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMSymbolAnimationColor state.

member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMSymbolAnimationColor and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine
member.summary: Represents the move along line animation.
member.remarks: Dynamically animates marker(s) along a line. The animation can be defined by either distance along the line or speed. The initial marker placement for the animation is determined by the MarkerPlacement property on the symbol layer, and the animation will move the marker(s) from that initial placement along the line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.MovementType
member.summary: Gets or sets the movement type, indicating whether the marker animates along the line by distance or by speed.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.DistanceAlong
member.summary: Gets or sets the distance as a percentage along the line to which the marker will animate. 0 corresponds to the starting placement of the marker, and 100 corresponds to a full movement along the line. This is only used if MovementType is set to Distance.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.Speed
member.summary: Gets or sets the speed at which the marker will animate along the line, in units of the line's unit per second. When the MovementType is set to Distance, the marker will move along the line at this speed until it reaches the DistanceAlong value. When the MovementType is set to Speed, the marker will move along the line at this speed, and DistanceAlong is ignored.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.Continuous
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the animation will loop continuously when Speed is defined. If true, once the marker reaches the end of the line it will jump back to the starting placement and repeat the animation continuously until the duration is reached.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMSymbolAnimationMoveAlongLine and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer
member.summary: Represents a symbol layer. Symbol layers are the components that make up a symbol. A symbol layer is represented by a stroke, fill, marker, or procedural symbol layer.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.Animations
member.summary: Gets or sets the animations that are applied to the symbol layer.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.Effects
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the geometric effects that are applied to the symbol layer. Effects dynamically alter the feature geometry when the symbology is applied. Multiple effects applied to a symbol layer are rendered sequentially.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.Enable
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the symbol layer is visible. The symbol layer draws only when enabled. Currently, an invisible layer is not considered in any transformations when in a 3D context.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the internal name of the symbol layer used for symbol level drawing.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.ColorLocked
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the color set at the basic properties level is applied to the symbol layer. If the symbol layer is color locked then changes made to the color in the basic properties will not be applied to the symbol layer.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.PrimitiveName
member.summary: Gets or sets the primitive name.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMSymbolLayer.Overprint
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the symbol layer should overprint in press printing.

member.summary: Symbol unit types.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SymbolUnits.Relative
member.summary: Relative units.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.SymbolUnits.Absolute
member.summary: Absolute units.

member.summary: Text is proper/mixed case.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextCase.LowerCase
member.summary: Text is all lower case.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextCase.Allcaps
member.summary: Text is all upper case.

member.summary: Gets or sets the left margin.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextMargin.Right
member.summary: Gets or sets the right margin.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextReadingDirection
member.summary: Text reading directions.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextReadingDirection.LTR
member.summary: Text is drawn from left-to-right.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextReadingDirection.RTL
member.summary: Text is drawn from right-to-left.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol
member.summary: Represents a text symbol which is used to draw text graphics, bleeds, and annotation. Text symbols do not contain any symbol layers but can have callouts.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Angle
member.summary: Gets or sets the amount of rotation applied to the text symbol, measured in degrees, around the geometry.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.AngleX
member.summary: Gets or sets the amount of rotation of the text symbol around the X axis, measured in degrees, around the geometry. This type of rotation is also referred to as tilt. It is applied in 3D.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.AngleY
member.summary: Gets or sets the amount of rotation of the text symbol around the Y axis, measured in degrees, around the geometry. This type of rotation is also referred to as roll. It is applied in 3D.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.BlockProgression
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction in which multi-line text is stacked.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Callout
member.summary: Gets or sets the callout or background of the text with optional leader lines.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.CompatibilityMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text in a fashion compatible with ArcMap.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.CountryISO
member.summary: Gets or sets the ISO code for the base country of the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Depth3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the depth of the glyph when drawn in 3D. This is an extrusion of the characters of the text in the Z axis.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.DrawGlyphsAsGeometry
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether fonts that are drawn as rasters at some scales to draw as vectors instead.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.DrawSoftHyphen
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether soft hyphens should be drawn. Soft hyphens are invisible markers that indicate where a hyphenated break is allowed within the text. They are only drawn if there is word wrapping at the end of a line.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.ExtrapolateBaselines
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the baseline of the text geometry should be expanded in the same manner as the existing geometry if the text extends beyond the baseline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FlipAngle
member.summary: Gets or sets the angle (in degrees from vertical) at which point rotated text is flipped (mirrored) in place.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontEffects
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the text is drawn as subscript or superscript.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontEncoding
member.summary: Gets or sets the font encoding.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontFamilyName
member.summary: Gets or sets the font family name of the font. e.g. Comic Sans.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontStyleName
member.summary: Gets or sets the style name for the font family. e.g. Regular, Bold, or Italic.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of font that the font family/style name reference.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FontVariationSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets an array of CIM font variation objects, describing a particular instance of a variable font through the font axis tags and their values. The number of CIM font variations will correspond to the number of variation axes specified by the font. This is only used for variable fonts.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.GlyphRotation
member.summary: Gets or sets an additional rotation that is applied to the individual glyphs contained in the text. This is applied to the individual glyphs whereas Angle, AngleX and AngleY are affect how the entire text string is oriented.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.HaloSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the halo that extends beyond the symbol shape.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.HaloSymbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the polygon symbol that is used to draw the halo for a text symbol.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Height
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the text in points.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Hinting
member.summary: Gets or sets if hinting from the font is used for text rendering. Hinting is information included with most fonts to effectively fit the vector glyphs of the font into the raster grid onto which they are displayed.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.HorizontalAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the alignment type used to align the text to the geometry horizontally. Affects which side of a point geometry the point text is drawn or which end of a line it is drawn close to. Commonly used to define how stacked text appears.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.IndentAfter
member.summary: Gets or sets how many points to indent the text back from the end of the baseline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.IndentBefore
member.summary: Gets or sets how many points to indent the text from the beginning of the baseline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.IndentFirstLine
member.summary: Gets or sets how many points to indent the text from the beginning of the baseline for the first line only.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Kerning
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the text is drawn with metric kerning, which adjusts the spacing between individual letter forms.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.LanguageISO
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the ISO code for the base language of the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.LetterSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the additional spacing that is added to each glyph beyond what is defined by its character box in the font. Value indicates the percentage of a glyph's width. Also known as tracking.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.LetterWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width that is added to each glyph beyond what is defined by its character box in its font. This is a percentage of the original glyph.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Ligatures
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether text is to be drawn with ligatures, which occur when two or more letters or portions of letters are joined to form a single glyph.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.LineGap
member.summary: Gets or sets the spacing between lines of text. This is also known as leading or line spacing.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.LineGapType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of line gap that is applied.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.OffsetX
member.summary: Gets or sets the X offset.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.OffsetY
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y offset.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.OffsetZ
member.summary: Gets or sets the Z offset.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.ShadowColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the color of the shadow that is defined for the text symbol. The shadow is drawn as an offset copy of the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.ShadowOffsetX
member.summary: Gets or sets the shadow offset from the text symbol in the horizontal direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.ShadowOffsetY
member.summary: Gets or sets the shadow offset from the text symbol in the vertical direction. If X and Y are zero, no shadow is drawn.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.SmallCaps
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the text should be drawn as Small Capitals, where lower case text is converted to small caps and upper case text is left as upper case.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Strikethrough
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text with a strike through it.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Symbol
member.summary: Gets or sets the polygon symbol that is used to draw the glyphs of the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Symbol3DProperties
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of properties that are applied to the text symbol only in a 3D context.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.TextCase
member.summary: Gets or sets the letter case used to draw the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.TextDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets the base text direction to draw the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Underline
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to draw the text with an underline.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.VerticalAlignment
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical alignment of the text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.VerticalGlyphOrientation
member.summary: Gets or sets the orientation for the non-vertical text in a vertical layout. For example, an English fragment in a Japanese text.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.WordSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the additional spacing that is added to between the words of the text string. 100% indicates that regular spacing is used.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.BillboardMode3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the billboard mode of the text symbol.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.Overprint
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether or not the symbol should overprint in press printing.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMTextSymbol.FromJson(System.String,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMTextSymbol with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMTextSymbol state.

member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMTextSymbol and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextureFilter
member.summary: Texture filter types.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextureFilter.Draft
member.summary: Low draft quality.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextureFilter.Picture
member.summary: Higher quality, recommended for pictures.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.TextureFilter.Text
member.summary: Higher quality, recommended when it is important to preserve edges for zoomed in images.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker
member.summary: Represents a vector marker which can represent vector graphics. It's constructed from MarkerGraphics which are geometries and symbols used as building blocks for the marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.Depth3D
member.summary: Gets or sets the depth of the marker when drawn in 3D.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.Frame
member.summary: Gets or sets the outer boundary of the entire vector marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.MarkerGraphics
member.summary: Gets or sets the vector graphics that define the shape of the marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.VerticalOrientation3D
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the marker stands upright as though locked in place. The marker can be viewed from all angles.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.ScaleSymbolsProportionally
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the strokes and or fills of a marker are scaled proportionally when the symbol size is changed.
member.remarks: When enabled, the strokes for the outline or fill of the polygon symbol used to draw the marker will be scaled proportionally with changes to the symbol size. If this property is not enabled, then the stroke will draw with the specified width regardless of the marker size.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.RespectFrame
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the frame of the vector marker should be honored when drawing the marker.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.ClippingPath
member.summary: Gets or sets a clipping path for the vector marker graphics.

member.summary: Reconstructs the CIMVectorMarker with a specified state from a JSON encoding.
member.param: The JSON string containing the CIMVectorMarker state.

member.name: M:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMVectorMarker.ToJson(ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonSerializationSettings)
member.summary: Creates a JSON encoding of the CIMVectorMarker and its current state.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment
member.summary: Vertical alignment types.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment.Top
member.summary: Top of the highest ascender in the text symbol is used to align the text.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment.Center
member.summary: Text is centered on the geometry.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment.Baseline
member.summary: Text is aligned so that the geometry lines up with the baseline of the text symbol. Descenders will go past the baseline.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalAlignment.Bottom
member.summary: Bottom of the lowest descender is used to align the text.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalGlyphOrientation
member.summary: Vertical glyph orientation.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalGlyphOrientation.Right
member.summary: Align right.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalGlyphOrientation.Upright
member.summary: Align upright.

member.name: F:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.VerticalGlyphOrientation.Mixed
member.summary: Mixed orientation following the Unicode vertical text layout standard.

member.name: T:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMWaterFill
member.summary: Represents a water fill which fills polygonal geometry with animated water.

member.summary: Gets or sets the intrinsic color of the water.

member.summary: Gets or sets the waterbody size allowing for a range of sizes from small pools to oceans. This property along with wave strength are the parameters which drive the wave appearance.

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMWaterFill.WaveHasDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the waves are directionless (false), or if they have a dominant direction (true).

member.name: P:ESRI.ArcGIS.CIM.CIMWaterFill.WaveDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets the azimuthal bearing for direction of the waves. Only has effect when WasHasDirection is true.

member.summary: A collection of settings that control JSON serialization.

member.summary: Gets and sets whether JSON output should be formatted with whitespace and newlines. Default value is true.

member.summary: Implemented by CIM classes to provide support for JSON serialization and deserialization.

member.name: T:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils
member.summary: Contains serialization utilities shared by ArcGIS Pro and the Enterprise SDK.
member.remarks: Exception policy: All "Try" methods will return null if a member can't be found or deserialized. All non-"Try" methods will throw, if a member can't be deserialized. This means if you call TrySetSimpleMember<int> and the JSON property is not an int, you'll get an exception.

member.name: M:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils.#cctor
member.summary: Static constructor, used to initialize assembly-dependent constants. (This class is shared between two different assemblies).

member.name: T:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils.PropertySetConstants
member.summary: String constants used for the serialization of Dictionaries. Also seen in PropertySet.cpp.

member.name: M:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils.ValidateType(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Verify that 'typename' is the type name for 'o'.

member.name: M:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils.TrySetObjectArrayMember(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject,System.String,System.Object[]@,ArcGIS.Core.CIM.JsonDeserializationSettings)
member.summary: Used for rare cases where a CIM member is held as an object[].

member.name: M:ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM.JsonUtils.TrySetEnumArrayMember``1(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject,System.String,``0[]@)
member.summary: Used for array of enum values of a specific type

member.summary: Used for rare cases where a CIM member is held as a Dictionary of string/object pairs.

member.summary: More forgiving version of DeserializeCIMObject. Used in rare cases where the type of object is not known (e.g. Dictionary or object[] properties).

member.summary: Used when the type is known at compile-time by the calling code. T can be a concrete or abstract class.
